name: Dropshots LLC
description: Dropshots LLC is a place to play pickleball in Ozark, MO. There are 8 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — See website for fees.

name: Fremont Hills Country Club
description: Private Club - must be a member.
fees: Members only — Private Club - must be a member.

name: Nixa Community Center
description: Nixa Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Nixa, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water. The courts are private.

name: Ozark High School Tennis Courts
description: Ozark High School Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ozark, MO. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Rotary Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rotary Park in Nixa, MO! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
